summary: Completed comprehensive backend testing of PHASE 13.3 Factor Generator. All 23 test cases passed with 100% success rate. System successfully generated 1193 factors from 313 features using 7 templates across 9 families. Integration with previous phases (89 nodes from PHASE 13.1, 313 features from PHASE 13.2) confirmed working correctly.
passed_tests: Factor Generator Health Check - Status healthy
Families endpoint - All 12 families present (momentum: 580, breakout: 266, regime: 150)
Factor generation (POST /run) - Successfully generates 100 factors per batch
Individual factor retrieval with proper structure
All factor families working (trend, breakout, momentum, volatility, regime, etc.)
All factor templates working (single, pair, triple, ratio, difference, interaction, regime)
Factor filtering by family and template
